waiting_for: Long: break above 29900 for a momentum entry; Short: pull‑back to EMA21 (~29824.5) for a potential EMA bounce short. No confluence strong enough to go ready yet.

long_assessment.reasoning: A break above the psychological level 29900 would signal continuation of the underlying downtrend reversal bias. The breakout would be entered with a STOP order just above 29900. Confluence: (1) proximity to round number, (2) EMA21 is only ~70 pts below price, offering near‑term support if the move stalls, (3) stochastic is neutral, allowing a clean breakout. Target is the top of the nearest bearish FVG (30054‑30093) where price often stalls after filling the gap. Stop is placed 60 pts below entry to give the trade breathing room while keeping R/R > 1.3.

short_assessment.reasoning: Price is currently 70.97 pts above EMA21, which acts as dynamic resistance in a strong downtrend (EMA21 < EMA75 < EMA150). A pull‑back to EMA21 would provide a clean limit entry for a short. Confluence: (1) EMA alignment confirming bearish bias, (2) psychological level 29800 lies just below EMA21, offering an additional magnet, (3) stochastic is neutral, not opposing the short bias. Target is the 29800 round‑number level; a 5‑pt buffer moves it to 29805. Stop is set 55.5 pts above entry, yielding an R/R ≈ 1.43, meeting the minimum requirement.
